versions.localizedDescription:
# this might not be the latest changelog for the tweak version!

* this only grabs from releases/latest as there is no changelog in actions. to check if it is newer than the release, go to commits in the original repo @ [GitHub](https://github.com/jaydenjcpy/EeveeSpotifyReincarnated) :P
---
### original changelog:

Release Notes:
- Updated to Spotify v9.1.48
- Fix crashes 

Patched vs Not Patched
Use patched if you use a paid cert or troll store

Use the non patched one for other methods like Sideloadly

Credits:
[faroukbmiled](https://github.com/faroukbmiled)
[zxPluginsInject](https://github.com/asdfzxcvbn/zxPluginsInject)

Common Issues:

https://www.reddit.com/r/eeveespotifyipa/comments/1t7e7q9/most_common_errors_and_how_to_solve/

https://github.com/jaydenjcpy/EeveeSpotifyReincarnated/blob/Master/common_issues.md

*VIEW .TXT FILE*
